@extends("complete_reactive_layout.html") @import("components_ui.html") @component("StatCard", label, value, note = "") {

${label}

${value}
@if(note) { ${note} }
} @component("PanelFrame") {
@slot("header")
@slot
@slot("footer")
} @define("content") { @signal(counter = counter) @signal(panelOpen = panelOpen)

All-in-one example

${pageTitle}

${description | capitalize}

@click("Increment Counter", counter, "inc", "1") @click("Toggle Panel", panelOpen, "toggle")

Bound counter: @bind(counter)

@effect(counter) {

Effect output counter = ${counter}

}
@render("StatCard", {"label": "Signals", "value": counter, "note": "Hydrated with SSR"}) @render("StatCard", {"label": "Blocks", "value": pageTitle, "note": "Layout + define"}) @render("StatCard", {"label": "Components", "value": featureCount, "note": "Props + loops"})
@reactive(counter, panelOpen) { @render("PanelFrame") { @fill("header") {

Reactive Control Panel

}

Counter value: ${counter}

@if(panelOpen) {

The panel is open and reacting to client-side signal changes.

    @for(feature in features) {
  • ${feature.name} - ${feature.status | title}
    • }
} @else {

The panel is closed. Toggle it to reveal the slot content and feature list.

} @fill("footer") { Last updated by hydrated signal state } } }

Streaming / Lazy Sections

@stream {

Immediate chunk rendered first.

} @defer {

Deferred chunk has loaded.

} @fallback {

Deferred chunk is loading...

} @lazy(panelOpen) {

Lazy content is visible because panelOpen is true.

} @fallback {

Lazy content hidden until panelOpen becomes true.

}

Filters / Include-style Data Rendering

User: ${userName | upper}

Search: ${searchQuery | urlencode}

Slug: ${pageTitle | slug}

Summary: ${summary | truncate 80 "..."}

@signal(todoDraft = "") @signal(todoResult = "Click refresh to load TODOs")

Template TODO CRUD using API calls

This section hydrates client-side and talks to the TODO CRUD API server.

Click refresh to load TODOs
@reactive(counter, panelOpen, todoDraft) { @render("SectionCard", {"title": "Imported Components + Attribute Events"}) {

These components are loaded from an imported template file.

@render("TodoItem", {"title": "Imported component demo", "completed": panelOpen}) { counter=${counter} draft=${todoDraft} } } } }
